principle: OMOS.OneGodian.com is the canonical protocol, documentation, runtime, and tool-page node. Product checkout remains on OneGodian.com. Public institutional identity remains on OneGodian.org. Quantum/OHI infrastructure positioning remains on QuantumOHI.com.

contentPillars.name: OMOS
contentPillars.role: Operating system and public specification layer

contentPillars.name: OHI
contentPillars.role: Intelligence synthesis and runtime reasoning layer

contentPillars.name: Algorithm
contentPillars.role: Observe, distill, align, select, execute, verify decision model

contentPillars.name: Tools
contentPillars.role: Interactive utility pages and WordPress shortcode targets

contentPillars.name: Artifacts
contentPillars.role: Whitepapers, WXR imports, animations, PDFs, manifests, and build records

contentPillars.name: Commerce
contentPillars.role: WooCommerce/Stripe product bridge, not direct checkout on OMOS node

pluginTargets.role: Commerce and WooCommerce product checkout layer
pluginTargets.pluginUse: Display OMOS product cards, route users to documentation, sync manifest, show runtime status.

pluginTargets.role: Public institutional explanation and identity layer
pluginTargets.pluginUse: Display OMOS explainers, tools, public framework summaries, and canonical content blocks.
Display runtime, protocol, OHI, and technical capability blocks that link back to OMOS.

definitionOfDone: Route exists in WordPress plugin manifest
Route is covered by smoke tests
Route has correct canonical link target
Route is connected to app.OneGodian.com manifest consumer
